allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: FastWrks InPersonMarketplace

- Next.js 16 web app with config-driven form rendering
- Two vertical configurations \(fireworks, farmers_market\)
- Dynamic vendor signup forms
- API routes for config and submissions
- Architecture documentation
- Environment setup for local dev \(port 3002\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/GitHub/Projects/inpersonmarketplace" add apps/web/src/app/api/buyer/orders/*/cancel/route.ts apps/web/src/app/api/checkout/success/route.ts apps/web/src/lib/stripe/config.ts apps/web/src/lib/stripe/payments.ts apps/web/src/lib/stripe/webhooks.ts apps/web/src/lib/constants.ts apps/web/src/app/*/checkout/page.tsx apps/web/src/app/api/checkout/session/route.ts docs/Build_Instructions/Stripe_Integration_Questions_with_CC_Responses.md)

Bash(git -C "C:/GitHub/Projects/inpersonmarketplace" commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix critical Stripe bugs, update fee structure with flat fee + minimum order

- Wire up createRefund\(\) in cancellation endpoint \(was TODO\)
- Add idempotency check to prevent duplicate payment records from
  success route and webhook both creating records
- Add $0.15 flat fee per side \(buyer + vendor\) to platform fees
- Add $10 minimum order enforcement at API and checkout UI
- Disable checkout button when below minimum with helpful message
- Add Stripe integration Q&A responses document

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/GitHub/Projects/inpersonmarketplace" commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add cancellation grace period \(1hr\) and 25% fee system

- 1-hour grace period from payment: free cancellation, full refund
- After grace period: 25% cancellation fee retained
- Buyer gets 75% of what they paid back
- Retained 25% split between platform \(13%\) and vendor \(87%\)
- Grace period set on order when payment succeeds \(both success route and webhook\)
- Migration adds grace_period_ends_at column to orders table
- Vendor notified of cancellation with their share amount

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/GitHub/Projects/inpersonmarketplace" commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Build dual-confirmation pickup flow with transfer trigger change

Pickup Confirmation System:
- Buyer confirms receipt -> 30-second window -> vendor counter-confirms
- Transfer to vendor only triggers after BOTH parties confirm
- Vendor fulfill route no longer triggers Stripe transfer \(just status update\)
- New vendor confirm-handoff endpoint triggers transfer

Buyer Order Detail Redesign:
- Mobile-first pickup presentation with green hero section
- Order number, market, vendor displayed prominently for showing to vendor
- Large "Confirm Receipt" button immediately below hero
- "I Did Not Receive This" report-issue option as alternative to confirming

Lockdown Mechanism:
- Vendor fulfill blocked if unresolved confirmations pending >5 minutes
- Soft lockdown \(30s\): notification to vendor
- Hard lockdown \(5min\): blocks other fulfill actions

New Endpoints:
- POST /api/vendor/orders/[id]/confirm-handoff \(triggers transfer\)
- POST /api/buyer/orders/[id]/report-issue \(dispute alternative\)

Migration:
- vendor_confirmed_at, confirmation_window_expires_at, lockdown columns
- issue tracking columns for dispute resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/GitHub/Projects/inpersonmarketplace" commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add How It Works documentation page

New public page at /[vertical]/how-it-works covering:
- Buyer ordering and pickup process
- Vendor order flow and pickup confirmation
- Step-by-step pickup mode guide for both parties
- Cancellation policy \(1-hour grace period, 25% fee after\)
- Emphasis on dual-confirmation process and why it matters
- Best practices for vendors at market

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(Private Pickup is available 🏠"

Meets buyer at their pain point with empathetic messaging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for table in listings listing_images listing_markets market_box_offerings order_items transactions vendor_market_schedules vendor_payouts vendor_verifications vendor_feedback)

Bash(git -C "C:/GitHub/Projects/inpersonmarketplace" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: Add comprehensive security and efficiency audit

Pre-launch audit covering:
- API security \(4 critical, 5 medium issues\)
- RLS policies \(recently fixed, 1 migration needed\)
- Frontend security \(good, 2 medium issues\)
- Stripe integration \(good, idempotency needed\)
- Performance \(images, caching, indexes\)

Includes action plan and recommended external tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Connect email \(Resend\) and SMS \(Twilio\) to notification service

- Replace email stub with Resend SDK integration and HTML email template
- Replace SMS stub with Twilio SDK integration

- Lazy-init clients to avoid unnecessary connections
- Gracefully skip channels when credentials not configured

EOF
\)")
